climate.description: Mild Nordic summer with coastal variability: expect cool temps, possible showers, and sea breezes.

fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 71. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 70.

course_description.character: A scenic coastal journey blending paved roads, gravel paths, forests, mountains, and North Sea beaches, emphasizing adventure and accessibility over pure speed.
course_description.signature_challenge: The relentless North Sea wind combined with 4900 ft of elevation on exposed coastal roads, rewarding resilient riders with unparalleled fjord-edge views.
suffering_zones: Coastal Hills: Rolling climbs along the North Sea Road with wind exposure and undulating terrain testing endurance.
Gravel Forest Sections: 20% gravel through wooded areas and mountains, demanding bike handling and steady power.
Final Push to Sandnes: Fatigue-building finale mixing surfaces after 96 miles of varied coastal landscapes.

logistics.lodging_strategy: Ample options in Sandnes, Egersund, and nearby Stavanger; book early for June event tied to local festivals.
logistics.transport: Point-to-point from Egersund to Sandnes with shuttle options likely; mass-start event for 12,500 riders, strong safety measures, timed and non-timed categories.

history.origin_story: Norway's second-largest cycling event, grown into a massive participatory race emphasizing inclusivity, safety, and Western Norway's beauty.

final_verdict.one_liner: Norway's ultimate coastal crusher: massive, scenic, and welcoming for every pedal-pusher.

citations.label: Nordsjørittet & Tour des Fjords | Western Norway on two wheels
